case_title: FRANCISCO RUBI VS. PINKERTON CONSULTING & INVESTIGATIONS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2011 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,901.80 FILED BY RUBI, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PINKERTON CONSULTING & INVESTIGATIONS SECURITAS SECURITY SERVICES USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2011 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUBI, FRANCISCO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBI, FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PINKERTON CONSULTING & INVESTIGATIONS SECURITAS SECURITY SERVICES USA, INC. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS RUN ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
